entry.title: 36::93 - No fun allowed

WarzauWynn posted a photo:

News crews report on a high school surfer who rescued two out of three people who were drowning at Ocean Beach. The third was not found.

entry.title: 36::68 - Garmin Edge 305
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

My trusty biking GPS. This thing is years old and the battery still holds a great charge. The biggest downside is that smartphones are so much better at geolocation now that this is hardly worth using anymore.
WarzauWynn posted a photo:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

entry.title: 36::63 - First bike commute of 2014
entry.summary:
WarzauWynn posted a photo:

I got out my trusty steed and rode it to work this morning. It's still going strong for a 9 year old that's never been tuned up before.
WarzauWynn posted a photo:
